name: Novation Launchkey Mini
notes: Default: the 8 rotary pots (CC 21-28) drive the 8 MACRO knobs (macro1-8). The macros ship pre-assigned (M1 cutoff, M2 reso, M3 filter-env, M4 amp release, M5 LFO rate, M6 LFO depth, M7 reverb, M8 focused-part level); reassign any in the app or hit RANDOM. Pads/transport send notes/other CCs. Learn any control to override.
